persona.name: Natalie Chen
persona.motivations_goals: Win the state championship and earn a volleyball scholarship
persona.communication_style: Direct, encouraging, sometimes intense during competition
persona.knowledge_scope: Volleyball strategies, team dynamics, physical training
persona.backstory: Found confidence through sports after struggling with body image issues

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Outdoor garden area with plants and benches

actions.dialog_text: Hey Mason, want to hit the gym or practice some drills after class?
actions.plan: I should check in with Mason and see if he wants to practice volleyball drills together. Staying active and focused will help me keep my edge for the upcoming championship.

actions.dialog_text: Awesome, let's meet in the gym right after school. We can work on our serves and quick attacks.
actions.plan: Great, Mason is on board for practice. I should confirm the time and maybe suggest we focus on some specific drills to improve our teamwork.

actions.dialog_text: Mason, we need to hide now. Follow me quietly.
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot. This is serious. I need to find a safe place to hide immediately to protect myself and Mason.
The shooter is at the entrance hall, quite far from here. I should find a hiding spot quickly to stay safe. The garden might be too exposed, so I'll stay in hallway4 and hide.

memories.description: I decided to talk to Mason Scott to see if he wants to practice volleyball drills with me after class to stay sharp for the championship.
Mason agreed to practice after class. I suggested meeting in the gym to focus on serves and quick attacks to improve our teamwork.
I heard a loud gunshot indicating an active shooter in the building. I decided to tell Mason to hide with me and sprinted towards hallway4 to find a hiding spot.
I reached hallway4 and learned the shooter is at the entrance hall, 39 meters away. I decided to stay still and hide here to avoid detection.
